messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Running the extension in desktop VS Code on Windows is expected to work through Remote-WSL, but nobody has proven it or written it down
What it solves: THE ASK, AS SCOPED. The intake had two halves; the human chose only this one. The second half (an
"Open Role Grid" command opening one VS Code terminal per live role, and/or promoting the existing
webview panel to THE consolidated view) is NOT in scope for this ticket and is not specced. If it is
w…
How it works: The extension host runs beside the swarm, never on the UI side
